headline: Public Service Enterprise to Release Q1 Earnings: What to Expect?
summary: PEG heads into Q1 earnings with demand from data centers, rate gains and grid upgrades boosting outlook, though higher costs may weigh on results.

headline: Fortis (FTS) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Fortis (FTS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
